heading: Repealed. ,July 22, 1932, ch. 52447 Stat. 741
label: 21 to 25 Repealed. ,July 22, 1932, ch. 52447 Stat. 741
notes: Section 21, , , defined a National Trade Union for purposes of this chapter.act June 29, 1886, ch. 567, § 124 Stat. 86
Section 22, , , related to rights of a National Trade Union upon incorporation in the office of the recorder of the District of Columbia.act June 29, 1886, ch. 567, § 224 Stat. 86
Section 23, , , related to power of an incorporated National Trade Union to establish and amend its own constitution, rules, and by-laws.act June 29, 1886, ch. 567, § 324 Stat. 86
Section 24, , , related to power of an incorporated National Trade Union to establish and grant powers to its own officers.act June 29, 1886, ch. 567, § 424 Stat. 86
Section 25, , , related to establishment of a headquarters of a National Trade Union in District of Columbia.act June 29, 1886, ch. 567, § 524 Stat. 86
